baseline.ignored-regex: #\[BC\] ADDED\: Parameter fieldArgs was added to Method validate\(\) of class Rebing\\GraphQL\\Support\\Privacy#
#\[BC\] ADDED\: Parameter resolveInfo was added to Method validate\(\) of class Rebing\\GraphQL\\Support\\Privacy#
#\[BC\] ADDED\: Parameter root was added to Method validate\(\) of class Rebing\\GraphQL\\Support\\Privacy#
#\[BC\] CHANGED\: Parameter 0 of Rebing\\GraphQL\\Support\\Privacy\#validate\(\) changed name from queryArgs to root#
#\[BC\] CHANGED\: Parameter 1 of Rebing\\GraphQL\\Support\\Privacy\#validate\(\) changed name from queryContext to fieldArgs#
#\[BC\] CHANGED\: The number of required arguments for Rebing\\GraphQL\\Support\\Privacy\#validate\(\) increased from 1 to 2#
#\[BC\] CHANGED\: The parameter \$args of Rebing\\GraphQL\\Support\\Privacy\#fire\(\) changed from no type to mixed#
#\[BC\] CHANGED\: The parameter \$context of Rebing\\GraphQL\\Support\\Middleware\#handle\(\) changed from no type to mixed#
#\[BC\] CHANGED\: The parameter \$queryArgs of Rebing\\GraphQL\\Support\\Privacy\#validate\(\) changed from array to mixed#
#\[BC\] CHANGED\: The parameter \$queryContext of Rebing\\GraphQL\\Support\\Privacy\#validate\(\) changed from no type to a non\-contravariant array#
#\[BC\] CHANGED\: The parameter \$queryContext of Rebing\\GraphQL\\Support\\Privacy\#validate\(\) changed from no type to array#
#\[BC\] CHANGED\: The parameter \$root of Rebing\\GraphQL\\Support\\Middleware\#handle\(\) changed from no type to mixed#
#\[BC\] CHANGED\: The parameter \$value of Rebing\\GraphQL\\Support\\Field\#__set\(\) changed from no type to mixed#
#\[BC\] CHANGED\: The return type of Rebing\\GraphQL\\Support\\Middleware\#handle\(\) changed from no type to mixed#
#\[BC\] CHANGED\: The return type of Rebing\\GraphQL\\Support\\Middleware\#resolve\(\) changed from no type to mixed#
